Case Studies

Results That Speak Clearly

Click any case study to expand the full story, methodology, and outcome. Real accounts. Real numbers.

Case Study 01 — Enterprise PPC
$50M in Ad Spend. $250M in Revenue.
Ignite Brands · 800+ SKUs · Multi-category · Amazon US
$250M
Revenue
-30%
CPC Drop
5x
ROAS
+

Inherited a fragmented 800+ SKU account with zero campaign structure — no match-type discipline, no negative keywords, no placement strategy. Rebuilt the entire advertising architecture from the ground up over 90 days while maintaining performance throughout the transition.

↑$250M revenue from $50M in ad spend — a consistent 5x return maintained across all categories
↓CPC reduced by 30% through surgical negative keyword strategy and match type restructuring
↓CPA down 25% — more conversions at a lower cost per acquisition across all 800+ SKUs
Revenue Growth Trajectory ($M)
Case Study 02 — Pharmlitalia
Day-1 Profitable in Beauty's Most Competitive Niche
Matrixyl 3000 Serum · Amazon UK · Beauty & Skincare
Rank #6
Main KW
143
KWs Ranked
Day 1
Profitable
+

Launched a new beauty brand into one of Amazon UK's most aggressive skincare categories. Built PPC architecture from a zero base — keyword research, bid strategy, campaign structure, listing optimization — and achieved profitability from the very first month, which is rare in this niche.

↑Ranked #6 for "matrixyl 3000 serum" — 6,603 monthly searches — within launch window
↑Ranked for "argireline serum" — 20,188 monthly searches — one of the category's highest-volume terms
↑143 keywords tracked in Data Dive with aggregate rank of 28
Keyword Rank Over 30 Days (lower = better)
Case Study 03 — Skincare Brand
Monthly Profit Scaled from $75K to $210K
Skincare · Amazon UK · 6-Month Scale Project
$210K
Monthly Profit
43.2%
Profitability
+180%
Growth
+

Inherited a profitable skincare brand that had hit a ceiling. Rebuilt the advertising strategy from the ground up — eliminating wasted spend, tightening match types, and restructuring the campaign hierarchy. Simultaneously improved listing conversion rates to compound the profit gain.

↑Monthly profit grew from $75K to $210K — a 180% increase in 6 months
↑Revenue scaled $101K to $162K per month while margin improved simultaneously
Monthly Profit Growth ($K)
Case Study 04 — Account Rescue
ACoS Collapsed from 38% to 10.81% in 90 Days
Health & Personal Care · Amazon US · Account Turnaround
38%
ACoS Before
10.81%
ACoS After
-72%
Reduction
+

Took over a personal care account that was hemorrhaging ad spend with no clear strategy. Conducted a full campaign audit, identified structural problems, rebuilt placement strategy, and built a negative keyword infrastructure that eliminated the majority of wasted spend within the first month.

↓ACoS dropped from 38% to 10.81% — a 72% reduction accomplished in under 90 days
↑$129K in sales delivered in the 30-day period immediately following the rebuild
ACoS Reduction Over 90 Days (%)
Case Study 05 — Fortune 500
2,500+ SKUs for Purina, Lipton & Hellmann's
Silicon Valley Commerce · CPG Brands · Amazon US
2,500+
SKUs
+40%
CVR Lift
20
Team Led
+

Led the listing creation department for globally recognized CPG brands. Every ASIN was built with SEO-first methodology — keyword research via Helium 10 and Data Dive, competitor analysis, bullet point optimization, and A+ content creation. Managed a team of 20 listing specialists while maintaining delivery timelines.

↑Brands served: Purina, Lipton, Hellmann's, Pet Zone, Nature's Miracle
↑40% conversion rate improvement from SEO-optimized listing strategy across the portfolio
↑Led a team of 20 specialists with consistent on-time delivery and quality standards

My Framework

How I Build 7-Figure Accounts

A repeatable, data-driven 4-step system developed over 7 years and $50M+ in managed ad spend.

01
🔬
Diagnose
Brand Analytics deep-dive — Search Terms, Item Comparison, Market Basket, Repeat Purchase. Map spend share and conversion gaps before touching campaigns.
View Market Analysis ↗
02
⚙️
Build
Campaign architecture from scratch — exact/phrase/broad split, placement multipliers, portfolio structure, negative keyword infrastructure. Full-funnel PPC from awareness to conversion.
03
📊
Track
Daily organic rank reports. Weekly KPI trackers. Monthly P&L deep-dives via SellerBoard. Every client has complete visibility in real time — no surprises, ever.
Weekly KPI Tracker ↗ Live Stats Dashboard ↗ Daily PPC Tracker ↗
04
🚀
Compound
Harvest converting search terms weekly. Expand keyword universe. Scale winners. Eliminate bleeders. Every week builds on the last — that's how accounts reach 7 figures and hold them.
